creator: bsd@inbox.com
text:
I upgraded xorg to 7.2 with full new installation of all ports
pkg_delete -a; rm -rf /usr/local/ /usr/X11R6

I found linux-firefox counldn't load any font from the new FontPath /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/*
just load fonts in ~/.fonts/*

my FontPath config from xorg.conf
Section "Files"
        FontPath "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/misc/:unscaled"
        FontPath "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/wqy/"
        FontPath "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/TTF/"
        FontPath "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/Type1/"
        FontPath "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/75dpi/"
        FontPath "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/100dpi/"
        FontPath "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/URW/"
        FontPath "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/webfonts/"
        #FontPath "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/arkpandora/"
EndSection

Fix: 

ln -s /usr/local /usr/X11R6
How-To-Repeat: portinstall xorg linux-firefox
